title: taraxacum bracteolatum
intro: Taraxacum bracteolatum, a lesser-known species of dandelion, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum bracteolatum lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, inflammation, and urinary problems due to their diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum bracteolatum include its ability to support liver and kidney function, lower blood pressure, and act as a natural laxative. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum bracteolatum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
